behavior_in_task_description.reason: All literals (SHAs, paths, env vars, target strings, error message, timeouts) are explicitly named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to do but doesn't dictate exact code structure or line changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for required strings/values that any correct implementation would include (sha256sum --check, target strings, dpkg --print-architecture).

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Most tests are grep/regex on file contents (e.g., 'sha256sum --check' in body, regex on Dockerfile content); they don't execute install_rustup or verify behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require specific strings/values present that a stub couldn't trivially satisfy without actual implementation.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each requirement (SHA verify, arch detection, env vars, timeout, PATH bug fix) has corresponding tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped into well-named TestInstallRustupFunction, TestDockerfileRustupEnv, TestDockerfileCiRustupEnv, TestCIWorkflowTimeout classes.

structured_data_schema.reason: YAML workflow schema (timeout-minutes, --max-time) is documented in instruction.md.

no_typos.reason: No typos detected in paths or variable names.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files to modify which is appropriate scope-setting, not line-level leakage.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Workflow YAML edits are localized to two values (timeout-minutes and --max-time).
